# MATRIX Schema Review

Thank you for reviewing the MATRIX research schema package.

Use this template to report schema issues, suggest improvements, or identify ambiguity in the MATRIX v0.2 schema architecture.

- [ ] `examples/event.procurement.example.json`
- [ ] `docs/MATRIX-v0.2-Technical-Note.md`
- [ ] Other:

7. Safety and Privacy Check
